instruction: The user's language is Traditional Chinese (zh-TW). Conduct the Q&A conversation in Traditional Chinese. All questions, example answers, and the story title (label) must be in Traditional Chinese.
label_hint: {a short Traditional Chinese title, 5-15 characters, used for save files}
example_variables:
體力: number, 80
信任度: number, 10
所屬勢力: string, 自由傭兵
example_goal: 在霓虹深淵酒吧接頭後，主角追蹤晶片線索深入地下黑市，與情報販子、企業特工、叛軍領袖三方周旋。一次突如其來的背叛摧毀了所有線索，將主角推向絕境。當真相浮出水面時，主角必須決定——相信誰，毀掉什麼，成為怎樣的人。
